issues.description: Blocker keyword effect is missing. The card text '[Blocker]' indicates this is a static keyword ability, not a triggered action. Blocker should be a permanent keyword on the card, not granted via Activated trigger.

Second ability '[End of Your Turn]' is completely missing from DSL. Card text states 'If you have 2 or more rested Characters, set this Character as active' — this requires trigger:EndOfTurn, condition checking rested character count, and action to set active (Rest with duration:Permanent or equivalent).

OnBlock is incorrect trigger type. Blocker is a static keyword ability that allows you to rest this card when opponent declares attack — it should not be a triggered effect with Rest action. The DSL structure fundamentally misrepresents the card mechanic.
Activated trigger is incorrect. The '[End of Your Turn]' ability should use trigger:EndOfTurn, not Activated.
